ddls:
CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator (e.g., $eq, $gt) */,
  "javascript_operator" TEXT /* JavaScript equivalent of the operator */,
  "example_query" TEXT /* Example query using the operator */,
  "js_example" TEXT /* Example in JavaScript using the operator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operator and its functionality */,
  "is_aggregate" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the operator is an aggregate function */,
  "is_comparison" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the operator is a comparison operator */,
  "is_logical" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the operator is a logical operator */,
  "is_mathematical" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the operator is a mathematical operator */,
  "sql_equivalent" TEXT /* SQL equivalent of the operator */,
  "performance_impact" TEXT /* Potential performance impact of the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "query_name" TEXT /* Name of the query */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the query */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the query was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the query was last updated */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the query */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the query */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the query */,
  "last_executed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the query was last executed */,
  "execution_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of query execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_operators" (
  "query_operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query operator usage */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator used in the query */,
  "operator_usage" TEXT /* Usage of the operator in the query (e.g., field, condition) */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the operator is required for the query */,
  "order_in_query" INTEGER /* Order of the operator in the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_operators_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_operators_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query execution */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the query */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Date and time the query was executed */,
  "execution_status" TEXT /* Status of the query execution (e.g., success, error) */,
  "result_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned by the query */,
  "execution_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the query execution in milliseconds */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the query execution failed */,
  "query_status_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the query status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_history_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result row */,
  "history_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query execution */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Data returned by the query execution */,
  "is_truncated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the result data is truncated */,
  "result_size" INTEGER /* Size of the result data in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_results_history_id FOREIGN KEY ("history_id") REFERENCES query_history ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "history_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query execution */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., run, edit, delete) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_audits_history_id FOREIGN KEY ("history_id") REFERENCES query_history ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "team_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_team_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_projects" (
  "query_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query-project association */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the query to the project */,
  "assigned_on" TEXT /* Date and time the query was assigned to the project */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the project is the primary project for the query */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the query within the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_projects_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color code for the tag */,
  "is_system_tag" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the tag is a system-defined tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_tag_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag assignment */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the tag to the query */,
  "assigned_on" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was assigned to the query */,
  "is_removable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the tag assignment can be removed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_tag_assignments_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES query_tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_tag_assignments_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_time" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is private */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_comments_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the query */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (1-5) */,
  "rating_time" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was given */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment along with the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_ratings_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query */,
  "shared_with_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the query was shared with */,
  "shared_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the query */,
  "shared_on" TEXT /* Date and time the query was shared */,
  "share_type" TEXT /* Type of share (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the share will expire */,
  "is_restricted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the share is restricted to specific actions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_shares_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_shares_shared_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_shares_shared_with_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
